title: Eastern Fantasy Haute Couture Poster AI
sourceTitle: Eastern Fantasy Haute Couture Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: High-end Eastern fantasy couture poster translating azure phoenix wind-feather spirit into a flying feather haute couture gown with translucent teal gauze and pale-gold linework. Subject: a slender elegant Eastern fantasy muse with an ethereal and mysterious expression wears a flying feather haute couture gown with translucent teal gauze and pale-gold linework, where feather textures, wind lines, soft wing-shaped veils, jade mist, and fine gold threads become garment structure, hair ornaments, drapery, ink movement, and aura. Scene: White-but-not-empty rice-paper atmosphere with light mist layers, pale ink breath, low-saturation gradients, and subtle Eastern fantasy motifs. Composition: Fixed 9:16 vertical fashion illustration with full-body elongated silhouette, gown as the visual core, flowing drapery around the body, and spacious rice-paper negative space. Style: Eastern ink-wash fashion illustration fused with fantasy haute couture, modern Oriental elegance, translucent gauze, fine gold linework, clean color transitions, and refined mysterious presence. Color Palette: Fixed soft natural palette led by azure phoenix wind-feather spirit, delicate gold line accents, clean low-saturation transitions, and airy rice-paper whites. Materials: Translucent gauze layers, flowing silk drapery, delicate pleats, ink-wash gradients, symbolic embroidery, and fine gold line details. Signature Elements: feather textures, wind lines, soft wing-shaped veils, jade mist, and fine gold threads integrated into the clothing language rather than taking over as creature bodies; calligraphic ink lines flow around the figure and hem. Restrictions: Keep one independent poster, text-free, logo-free, watermark-free, elegant, clean, couture-centered, and free of cheap costume-game styling.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
